case_title: LOUIE SISNEROS VS. JANE DOE et al

NTC OF RULING OF ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SISNEROS, LOUIE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER JUDGEMNT PURSUANT TO STIP, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SISNEROS, LOUIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SISNEROS, LOUIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAL, ARCHANA K. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 414 23RD AVENUE, #3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121 $3,300.00 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,100.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BAL, ARCHANA K.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SISNEROS, LOUIE AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JANE DOES II-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SISNEROS, LOUIE ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BAL, ARCHANA K.
